title: CKG Benchmark Q&A Manifest
description: Manifest that drives a CKG benchmark run: selects golden-set questions, context-provision methods, driver, and run parameters.

experiment.description: Human-readable experiment name, used as the output directory prefix.

golden_set.description: How to select questions from the golden-set library.

source.description: Path (relative to cks-bench root) to the golden-set index YAML or a glob pattern.

ids.description: If present, run only these question IDs (e.g. ["G01","G02"]). Empty or absent means all.

buckets.description: If present, restrict to questions from these buckets.

methods.description: Ordered list of context-provision methods to evaluate.

driver.description: AI driver to use for all method runs.

go_stablenet_root.description: Absolute path to the go-stablenet repository root. Used by M1/hallucination scorer for disk fallback.

sha_pin.description: Git SHA (full or short) of the go-stablenet commit the golden-set was authored against. Matched to indexed_head at run start.

batch_size.description: Number of (question, method) cells to run per invocation before saving state and allowing resume.

output_dir.description: Directory (relative to cks-bench root) where run artifacts are written. Defaults to 'runs/<experiment>'.

replay_dir.description: Path to directory containing replay fixture files (for replay driver).

claude_cli_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for each claude CLI invocation.

cks_config.description: cks MCP server configuration for methods M2/M3/M4.

health_check.description: Abort run if cks health check fails (for methods that require cks).
